info.title: Acume Consumer API
info.description: Consumer-facing REST API for AP/AR automation (suppliers, GL codes, GL segments).

401.description: Missing or invalid bearer token. This is API Gateway's own built-in Unauthorized response -- the TOKEN Lambda authorizer denies the request before it ever reaches the application, so the body is NOT the app's usual {"error": {...}} envelope.

429.description: Too many requests -- see Retry-After header (type: rate_limit_error, code: rate_limit_exceeded).

503.description: Temporarily unavailable -- see Retry-After header (code: service_unavailable).

400.description: Invalid query parameter, e.g. limit out of range or a malformed cursor (code: invalid_request).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response.

parameters.name: updated_at[gte]
parameters.description: Only rows updated at or after this ISO-8601 timestamp.

429.description: Too many requests -- see Retry-After header (type: rate_limit_error, code: rate_limit_exceeded).

400.description: Malformed JSON body (code: malformed_json), or the body failed schema validation (code: validation_error).

409.description: A unique field already exists (code: resource_already_exists), or an Idempotency-Key request is still being processed (code: idempotency_in_progress).

422.description: Idempotency-Key was already used with a different request payload (code: idempotency_key_reused).

post.summary: Exchange an api_key for a JWT

400.description: api_key missing from the request body (code: invalid_request).

401.description: api_key does not match any client (code: invalid_api_key). NOTE: unlike every other endpoint's 401, this one IS the app's own Error envelope, since it's raised in application code (token_handler), not by an API Gateway authorizer -- this endpoint has no authorizer in front of it.

Error.description: Canonical error envelope. Every non-2xx response is {"error": ...} with this shape.

type.description: Broad Stripe-style category clients can branch on for coarse handling.

code.description: Stable machine-readable code for fine-grained branching.

field.description: Present on single-field errors outside `details` (e.g. a 404/409/400 caused by exactly one bad input, like a duplicate `code` or an unknown `gl_code`). Points at the offending field without parsing `message`.

details.description: Present only when code="validation_error": one entry per field violation.

field.description: Dotted path to the offending field, e.g. 'items.0.sku'.

message.description: Human-readable, always starts with a capital letter.

retry_after.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Present on 429/503 only; also echoed in the Retry-After header.

request_id.description: Echoed in the x-request-id header. Include this when contacting support.

doc_url.description: Link to the docs page for this specific `code`.

GatewayUnauthorizedError.description: API Gateway's default Unauthorized response for a denied/erroring TOKEN Lambda authorizer (auth/lambda_function.py::authorizer_handler). Distinct from the app's Error schema -- the request never reaches the application.

id.description: Supplier number, used as the external identifier.
id.title: Id

abn_or_nzbn.description: AU ABN or NZ NZBN, derived from legal_registration_identifier. Read-only.
abn_or_nzbn.title: Abn Or Nzbn

updated_at.description: Last updated timestamp in ISO-8601 UTC format.
updated_at.title: Updated At

line_1.description: Address line 1. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
line_1.title: Line 1

line_2.description: Address line 2. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
line_2.title: Line 2

line_3.description: Address line 3. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
line_3.title: Line 3

city.description: City or town. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
city.title: City

postal_code.description: Postal or zip code. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
postal_code.title: Postal Code

subdivision.description: State, province, or other regional subdivision. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
subdivision.title: Subdivision

account_number.description: Bank account number. Letters and digits only. Spaces and hyphens are accepted but stripped before storage (e.g. '12-3456 7890' becomes '1234567890').
account_number.title: Account Number

is_default.description: Whether this is the default account for payments. At most one account in a given bank_accounts list may be explicitly true; submitting more than one raises a validation error.
is_default.title: Is Default

supplier_number.description: Unique supplier identifier, set at creation and immutable thereafter (not present on UpdateSupplierInput).
supplier_number.title: Supplier Number

name.description: Supplier name. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
name.title: Name

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. NZ, AU). Case-insensitive; normalized to uppercase. Only NZ and AU are saved, other country codes are discarded.
country.title: Country

currency.description: ISO 4217 3-letter alphabetic currency code (e.g. NZD, AUD, USD).
currency.title: Currency

full_formal_name.description: Full legal/formal name of the supplier, if different from `name`. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
full_formal_name.title: Full Formal Name

tax_rate.description:
Case-insensitive; '%' suffix optional for numeric values (e.g. '10' matches '10%').

Allowed values by tax_category:

| tax_category | Allowed tax_rate |
|---|---|
| S (Standard) | `15%`, `12%`, `10%` |
| E (Exempt) | `No Tax` |
| Z (Zero-rated) | `0%` |
| C | `10%` |
| G | `No Tax` |
| O | `No Tax` |
tax_rate.title: Tax Rate

payment_terms.description: Payment terms (e.g. '30D'). Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
payment_terms.title: Payment Terms

tax_reg_no.description: Tax registration number. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
tax_reg_no.title: Tax Reg No

document_delivery_channel.description: How documents are delivered to this supplier: 'email' or 'peppol'. Omit if not yet known/configured.
document_delivery_channel.title: Document Delivery Channel

legal_registration_identifier.description: For AU/NZ suppliers: must be 10-15 digits. Dashes and spaces are accepted and stripped; stored and returned in digits-only form. For all other countries, any non-empty string is accepted.
legal_registration_identifier.title: Legal Registration Identifier

additional_legal_info.description: Any additional legal information about the supplier. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
additional_legal_info.title: Additional Legal Info

supplier_alt_id.description: Alternative/external identifier for the supplier. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
supplier_alt_id.title: Supplier Alt Id

status.description: Status code. '1' for active, '0' for inactive. Defaults to '1' if omitted.
status.title: Status

bank_accounts.description: Bank accounts to create for this supplier.
bank_accounts.title: Bank Accounts

subdivision.description: State, province, or other regional subdivision.
subdivision.title: Subdivision

account_number.description: Bank account number, stored digits/letters-only (hyphens and spaces stripped).
account_number.title: Account Number

is_default.description: Whether this is the default account for payments.
is_default.title: Is Default

line_number.description: Sequence number of this line within the supplier's default codings.
line_number.title: Line Number

gl_code.description: GL code for this default coding line.
gl_code.title: Gl Code

gl_code_description.description: Display description of the GL code, joined from the GL codes table.
gl_code_description.title: Gl Code Description

allocation_percentage.description: Percentage of the invoice allocated to this line, 0-100.
allocation_percentage.title: Allocation Percentage

tax_rate.description: Tax rate for this line, as submitted (e.g. '15%').
tax_rate.title: Tax Rate

peppol_status_id.description: Internal status identifier for this supplier's Peppol registration.
peppol_status_id.title: Peppol Status Id

legal_registration_identifier.description: Legal registration identifier used for Peppol, digits-only for AU/NZ.
legal_registration_identifier.title: Legal Registration Identifier

id.description: Supplier number, used as the external identifier.
id.title: Id

abn_or_nzbn.description: AU ABN or NZ NZBN, derived from legal_registration_identifier. Read-only.
abn_or_nzbn.title: Abn Or Nzbn

updated_at.description: Last updated timestamp in ISO-8601 UTC format.
updated_at.title: Updated At

full_formal_name.description: Full legal/formal name of the supplier.
full_formal_name.title: Full Formal Name

nzbn.description: NZ Business Number, if applicable. Read-only.
nzbn.title: Nzbn

additional_legal_info.description: Any additional legal information about the supplier.
additional_legal_info.title: Additional Legal Info

document_delivery_channel.description: How documents are delivered to this supplier.
document_delivery_channel.title: Document Delivery Channel

peppol.description: Peppol e-invoicing registration details, if registered.

bank_accounts.description: Bank accounts on file for this supplier.
bank_accounts.title: Bank Accounts

contacts.description: Contacts on file for this supplier.
contacts.title: Contacts

default_codings.description: Default GL coding lines for this supplier.
default_codings.title: Default Codings

UpdateSupplierInput.description:
Partial update. Only fields explicitly provided are applied (model_dump(exclude_unset=True)).

Bank accounts are synced as a full replace when provided (frontend sends complete list).
Contacts use dedicated sub-resource endpoints (/contacts).
Default codings use dedicated sub-resource endpoints (/default-codings).
Address (1:1) and legal_registration_identifier are updated directly in this endpoint.
supplier_number is immutable once set and is intentionally not present here.

name.description: Supplier name. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
name.title: Name

full_formal_name.description: Full legal/formal name of the supplier, if different from `name`. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
full_formal_name.title: Full Formal Name

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. NZ, AU). Case-insensitive; normalized to uppercase.
country.title: Country

status.description: Status code. '1' for active, '0' for inactive. Omit to leave unchanged.
status.title: Status

tax_rate.description:
Case-insensitive; '%' suffix optional for numeric values (e.g. '10' matches '10%').

Allowed values by tax_category:

| tax_category | Allowed tax_rate |
|---|---|
| S (Standard) | `15%`, `12%`, `10%` |
| E (Exempt) | `No Tax` |
| Z (Zero-rated) | `0%` |
| C | `10%` |
| G | `No Tax` |
| O | `No Tax` |
tax_rate.title: Tax Rate

currency.description: ISO 4217 3-letter alphabetic currency code (e.g. NZD, AUD, USD).
currency.title: Currency

payment_terms.description: Payment terms (e.g. '30D'). Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
payment_terms.title: Payment Terms

tax_reg_no.description: Tax registration number. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
tax_reg_no.title: Tax Reg No

document_delivery_channel.description: How documents are delivered to this supplier: 'email' or 'peppol'. Omit to leave unchanged.
document_delivery_channel.title: Document Delivery Channel

legal_registration_identifier.description: For AU/NZ suppliers: must be 10-15 digits. Dashes and spaces are accepted and stripped; stored and returned in digits-only form. For all other countries, any non-empty string is accepted.
legal_registration_identifier.title: Legal Registration Identifier

additional_legal_info.description: Any additional legal information about the supplier. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
additional_legal_info.title: Additional Legal Info

supplier_alt_id.description: Alternative/external identifier for the supplier. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
supplier_alt_id.title: Supplier Alt Id

address.description: Supplier's postal/business address. Full replace of the address object when provided.

bank_accounts.description: Full replacement of this supplier's bank accounts. If provided, the entire existing set is replaced — this is not a merge or append. Omit this field entirely to leave existing bank accounts unchanged. Submit an empty list ([]) or null to remove all bank accounts.
bank_accounts.title: Bank Accounts

UpdateSupplierInput.title: UpdateSupplierInput

email.description: Contact email address. Must contain a local part, an @, and a domain with at least one dot (e.g. name@example.com). Not validated against the full RFC 5322 email spec, so some unusual-but-technically-valid formats may be rejected.
email.title: Email

name.description: Contact name. Accepts letters (any language), numbers, spaces, and - . , ' " & ( ) /. Other characters, including HTML tags and control characters, are rejected.
name.title: Name

phone.description: Contact phone number. Digits, spaces, and the characters + - ( ) . / , with an optional extension suffix (e.g. 'x123' or 'ext. 123').
phone.title: Phone

CreateContactsInput.description: Bulk-create payload: one or more supplier contacts in a single request.

contacts.description: One or more contacts to create for this supplier, up to 100 per request.
contacts.title: Contacts

CreateContactsInput.title: CreateContactsInput

UpdateGlSegmentInput.description:
Partial update. Only fields explicitly provided are applied (model_dump(exclude_unset=True)).

`level` and `alt_id` cannot be changed after creation and are intentionally not
settable here.
